columns.column_name: Previous local therapy - N (%) | Orchiectomy | Treatment
columns.extraction_plan: The document mentions that eligible patients could have had "previous local therapy" (page 4, section 2.1), but it does not specify the types of previous local therapy (e.g., orchiectomy) or provide counts/percentages for these by treatment arm. The "Procedures" section (page 4, section 2.3) mentions "orchidectomy" as part of the *current* lifelong ADT, not as a *previous* local therapy.
